title: The Jolson Story
writer: Sidney Buchman, Harry Chandlee, Stephen Longstreet
actors: Larry Parks, Evelyn Keyes, William Demarest
plot: This movie shows the idealized career of the singer Al Jolson, a little Jewish boy who goes against the will of his father in order to be in showbiz. He becomes a star, falls in love with a non-Jewish dancer, and marries her. In t...
